int.name: classical
int.description: Classical tearing mode contribution to the stability index

int.name: bootstrap
int.description: Bootstrap current contribution to the stability index

int.name: GGJ
int.description: Glasser-Greene-Johnson contribution to the stability index

int.name: current_drive
int.description: Current drive contribution to the stability index

int.name: heating
int.description: Heating contribution to the stability index
